goal: Schedule a Zoom meeting at 3:30 PM on June 11, 2026.

spec.purpose: Create local Apple Calendar events from a title, start time, end time, location, and notes.
safety: Do not claim to create a real Zoom link unless one is provided.
If duration is missing, default to one hour.
